meta.poznamky: Seřaď 6 bloků UVNITŘ smyčky: f30 + penUp + f20 + penDown + f30 + r90. Každá strana čtverce má mezeru uprostřed. Start: (120,120) uhel 0. Každá strana: 30+20+30=80px, mezera 20px uprostřed.

cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky uvnitř smyčky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]čtverec s mezerou uprostřed každé strany[/hlp] — přerušovaný čtverec.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn1"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1" x="300" y="20"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1" x="20" y="200"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2" x="300" y="160"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1" x="20" y="340"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1" x="300" y="300"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3" x="160" y="420"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" id="r1" x="20" y="20"><value name="TIMES"><block type="math_number" id="mn1"><field name="NUM">4</field></block></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward" id="f1"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="pu1"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f2"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="pd1"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="f3"><field name="DISTANCE">30</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="rg1"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
